summary: Add `podcast clip`: transcript-window scoring and ffmpeg extraction for short-form podcast clips.
reason: ElevenLabs provides transcription primitives but no viral-clip extractor; this hand-authored workflow scores transcript windows and cuts durable clip artifacts locally.
validated_outcome: go build ./...; go vet ./...; go test ./...; govulncheck ./...; python3 .github/scripts/verify-skill/verify_skill.py --dir library/ai/elevenlabs/
